title: New robot waifus, GLM 5.2 craze, AI spas, new world models, new science agents: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search covers recent developments in generative video, world models, image generation, robotics, and large language models. Featured tools include DreamX World, PermaVid, Boogu Image, GLM 5.2, LTX Trainer, and Midjourney Medical alongside robot platforms and science agents.
writeup: This AI Search roundup surveys recent releases across generative video, world models, image generation, robotics, and large language models. Featured tools include DreamX World, PermaVid, Boogu Image, GLM 5.2, LTX Trainer, and Midjourney Medical, alongside robot platforms and science agents. The episode touches on concepts such as world models, text-to-speech, and test-time compute. The value is breadth: a single pass across multiple AI domains and the specific tools shipping in each.
